# ocp_tier (Data Source)

Represents a platform's service level. Assign to volume or virtual machine based on desired performance and availability requirements.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) Available tier names: `Platinum`, `Gold`, `Silver` & `Bronze`
- `solution` (String) Allowed values: `OCP`, `TDL` & `CAAS`. Defaults to `OCP`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
